query:
-- Move session 20 and 21 trades to 60 days ago (out of all yield windows)
UPDATE paperTrades 
SET closedAt = DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 60 DAY)
WHERE sessionId IN (20, 21);

-- Close all open positions in sessions 20 and 21 (if any)
UPDATE paperPositions 
SET status = 'closed', closedAt = DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 60 DAY)
WHERE sessionId IN (20, 21) AND status = 'open';

-- Reset ledger to session 22 with $100K fresh
UPDATE paperLedger 
SET sessionId = 22, availableCash = 100000, initialCapital = 100000
WHERE userId = 1;

-- Move session 20 and 21 trades to 60 days ago (out of all yield windows)
UPDATE paperTrades 
SET closedAt = DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 60 DAY)
WHERE sessionId IN (20, 21);

-- Close all open positions in sessions 20 and 21 (if any)
UPDATE paperPositions 
SET status = 'closed', closedAt = DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 60 DAY)
WHERE sessionId IN (20, 21) AND status = 'open';

-- Reset ledger to session 22 with $100K fresh
UPDATE paperLedger 
SET sessionId = 22, availableCash = 100000, initialCapital = 100000
WHERE userId = 1;
